overview: VNR Vignana Jyothi Institute of Engineering and Technology (VNRVJIET), Hyderabad was established in 1995 by the Vignana Jyothi Society. It is an autonomous institution affiliated to JNTUH and approved by AICTE. VNRVJIET has been ranked in the 151-200 band in NIRF India Rankings 2025. The college is accredited by NAAC with 'A++' grade and all eligible programs are NBA accredited. VNRVJIET is recognized for its strong emphasis on innovation, entrepreneurship, and industry-integrated curriculum. It is one of the top-tier private engineering colleges in Telangana.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Grade, NBA Accredited (all eligible programs), AICTE approved, JNTUH affiliated (Autonomous)

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (CSE - AI/ML, Data Science, Cyber Security)

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech: 70% seats through TG EAPCET counselling (TSCHE convenor quota), 30% management quota. M.Tech: GATE + institutional counselling. MBA: TSICET counselling.

campus.specialNote: VNRVJIET's VJ Hub is a MSME-recognized incubation center that supports student startups. The college also has strong ties with IIT Hyderabad for collaborative research.

contact.address: Pragathi Nagar, Nizampet, Bachupally, Hyderabad – 500090, Telangana, India
